products.name: The FBI reportedly won’t investigate ICE anymore
products.summary: According to the New York Times, federal agents have been told that the FBI will no longer be investigating confrontations involving ICE agents. The DHS and DOJ denied the change in policy to The Times. The reported change in guidance follows renewed scrutiny

products.name: Orchid is a delightfully retro and approachable hipster synth

products.name: Birdfy’s solar-powered smart feeder is down to one of its best prices

products.name: US Marshals arrest the Tate brothers in Miami
products.summary: The manosphere influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate were arrested Saturday in Miami by US Marshals in relation to new rape and sex trafficking charges in England. According to the Associated Press, British authorities are seeking the brothers' extradition. The

products.name: The future of physical games is not looking great
products.summary: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on video games and physical media, follow Jay Peters. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes on Sunday at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.

products.name: The grueling, 630-mile road race where the only fuel is sunlight

products.name: Netflix paid $587M for Ben Affleck’s AI filmmaking startup
products.summary: Netflix revealed that it paid $587 million in cash for InterPositive, a startup co-founded by Ben Affleck.
